# G7 TP Fixture: consumers question absent

## Scope Challenge

### Q1: Does this need to exist?

Yes. This addresses a critical gap in the pipeline and justifies its
existence by eliminating manual reconciliation steps.

### Q3: Cost of inaction

The do-nothing cost is three engineer-days per week lost to manual
intervention. The status quo is not sustainable at current growth rates.

### Q4: Barbell option

Either build the minimal version (two weeks) or the full platform (six months);
there is no middle ground that delivers proportional value.
